content: Blocked on TP-182 implementation: the execution snapshot only contains `docs/`, `taskplane-tasks/`, and markdown files. The prompt-scoped implementation files are missing: `dashboard/server.cjs`, `dashboard/public/index.html`, `dashboard/public/app.js`, `dashboard/public/style.css`, `extensions/taskplane/discovery.ts`, and `extensions/taskplane/types.ts`. I verified with `ls`, `find`, and `wc -l` from the repo root. I logged the blocker and preflight findings in `taskplane-tasks/TP-182-dashboard-backlog-view/STATUS.md`, but I cannot trace current dashboard data flow or implement the backlog feature without those sources.
